aesthetic_vibe: Serious educational instrument, editorial publication, print-inspired, structured, academic-modern.

typography.rules: NO INTER OR ROBOTO. Use highly structured editorial typography combining Serif for display, Sans for legibility, and Mono for technical data.

headings.usage: H1, H2, major step titles, prompt card titles.

mono.usage: CEFR levels (A1, B2, etc.), code blocks, actual prompt text, small metadata tags.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Think of print margins on high-quality paper. Use asymmetric grids where applicable but maintain strict vertical rhythm.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 py-12 md:py-20
spacing_and_layout.radii: rounded-none or rounded-sm. Avoid heavily rounded corners to maintain the 'instrument' feel.

header.style: Minimalist top bar. Left: 'AI Prompt Bank' in serif + Byline. Right: EN/UK language toggle.
header.byline: text-xs font-mono text-secondary. 'by Valentyna Gordiienko, Sr. LXD, DLI'

progress_indicator.style: Architectural segmented line (1px high) spanning the width of the container. Active segment is charcoal, inactive is light gray.

wizard_steps.step_0_aspects: Cards with emoji + serif title. Hover state: 1px solid charcoal border, off-white bg.
wizard_steps.step_1_topic: Adaptive input: Massive font-serif transparent background with 1px bottom border. Looks like writing on a blank page. Below it: 4 horizontal diagnostic radio-buttons.
wizard_steps.step_2_cefr: 8-cell grid. Font-mono for levels. Minimalist toggle style.
wizard_steps.step_4_bloom: Vertical stepper or horizontal connected nodes. Font-serif for the taxonomy level name, font-sans for description.
wizard_steps.step_5_activities: Pills/Cards with 1px border. Colored based on AI tool requirement (NotebookLM/Blue, ChatGPT/Green, Claude/Purple).

result_cards.container: bg-white border border-[#E6E4DF] shadow-sm p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col gap-6
result_cards.tabs: MAIN / EASIER / HARDER as minimalist text tabs with underline indicator for active.

sections.before: Left border 4px solid #6D28D9 (Purple). Includes Activation prompt.
sections.during: Left border 4px solid #2563EB (Blue). Includes Main Task prompt.
sections.after: Left border 4px solid #059669 (Green). Includes Reflection prompt.

result_cards.prompt_block: bg-[#F7F5F0] p-4 font-mono text-sm relative group. Includes 'Copy' button appearing on hover.
result_cards.spaced_repetition: Bottom bar of the After card. 3 checkboxes: Tomorrow, Day 3, Day 7. Styling: minimalist square checkboxes.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. 1px borders become darker. Backgrounds shift slightly (e.g., white to off-white). No blurry shadows.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: 2px solid charcoal outline offset by 2px (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#1C1C1A]).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards against #F7F5F0 and #FFFFFF backgrounds. Colored badges must have dark enough text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to every interactive element (e.g., data-testid='lang-toggle', data-testid='aspect-card-vocabulary', data-testid='copy-prompt-btn').

images.description: Professional author portrait for Valentyna's byline/about section if needed.
Library ceiling architecture. Could be used at low opacity for an introductory hero section if an onboarding page is built.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Work Sans, Newsreader, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Implement the background as an off-white/ivory (#F7F5F0) to give it an editorial 'print' feel.
Strictly avoid default Inter or Roboto. Do not use standard Shadcn card styles (heavily rounded/shadowed); customize them to be flatter with 1px sharp borders.
Implement the 6-step wizard using state management. Use smooth sliding or fading transitions between steps.
In Step 1, the 'adaptive placeholder' means a large input field where typing feels like writing an article headline.
Implement the hard-coded color logic for Before (Purple), During (Blue), After (Green).
For the Spaced Repetition checkboxes, use a minimalist custom design, not default browser checkboxes.
Remember to include data-testid on ALL interactive elements.
